data.name: ProFrac Holding Corp.
data.description: ProFrac Holding Corp. operates as a technology-focused energy services holding company in the United States. It operates through four segments: Stimulation Services, Proppant Production, Manufacturing, and and Flotek Industries, Inc. The company offers hydraulic fracturing, proppant production, well stimulation, in-basin frac sand, and other completion services and complementary products and servi...

data.name: AECOM
data.description: AECOM, together with its subsidiaries, provides professional infrastructure consulting services for governments, businesses, and organizations internationally. The company operates in three segments: Americas, International, and AECOM Capital. data.name: Actuate Therapeutics, Inc. Common stock
data.description: Actuate Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops therapies for the treatment of cancers in the United States. The company's lead product candidate is elraglusib injection, a glycogen synthase kinase-3 inhibitor that is in Phase 2 trial to treat metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. It also develops elraglusib, which is in Phase 1/2 trial for the treatment of ...

data.name: American Drive Acquisition Company
data.description: American Drive Acquisition Company focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities focusing defense, logistics, transportation, technology and AI sectors.
